focused_test.command: cd desktop && bun run test -- --run src/__tests__/skillsSettings.test.tsx
focused_test.result: failed with pre-existing/T006 RED UI expectation outside T007 write scope
focused_test.summary: 4 passed, 1 failed. Failure: Settings > Skills tab > shows workflow-safe catalog reference metadata without bundling skill contents cannot find visible text 'telegram'. Rendering pluginName in SkillList is a UI/component change outside T007 write scope.

scoped_typecheck.command: cd desktop && bunx tsc --noEmit --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target es2022 --jsx react-jsx --strict --skipLibCheck --types vite/client src/types/session.ts src/types/skill.ts src/api/skills.ts src/stores/skillStore.ts

diff_check.command: git diff --check -- desktop/src/types/session.ts desktop/src/types/skill.ts desktop/src/api/skills.ts desktop/src/stores/skillStore.ts

full_desktop_lint.summary: TypeScript errors are in desktop/src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx RED tests added by T006: EDITABLE_TEMPLATE.phases[0] may be undefined, and a spread phase object may have id: string | undefined.

remaining_failures.summary: SkillList does not visibly render pluginName 'telegram'; T007 exposes pluginName/provenance in types/store/API but cannot edit UI components.
Full desktop lint is blocked by RED test type issues in a file outside T007 write scope.

concerns: The desktop skills API now exposes a catalog() helper using the existing /api/skills endpoint with catalogOnly=true; the current server ignores that query and still returns metadata-only skill records, so this remains backward-compatible and does not fetch detail contents.

fetchSkills mirrors the list response into catalog so existing settings behavior can seed workflow selectors without a second request; fetchCatalog exists for later workflow UI code that wants an explicit catalog-only path.
Workflow phase skill source/provenance metadata is names-first; pluginName remains provenance metadata and is not made the primary workflow binding.
No SkillTool invocation, auto-exec behavior, default gates, bundled skill contents, or permission bypass paths were added.
recovery_hints: T008 should consume useSkillStore().catalog or fetchCatalog() in WorkflowTemplateEditor and render phase-local recommended skill controls without calling fetchSkillDetail.
T008 should preserve existing WorkflowPhaseSkillReference objects when saving, including reason, pluginName, referenceId, contentHash, and unknown fields.
If the skills settings RED assertion remains required, render pluginName/provenance in SkillList or adjust the test owner to the component task because T007 intentionally did not edit UI components.
Fix the RED WorkflowComponents.test.tsx type narrowing in the owning test/component task before relying on full desktop lint.
